Weddings and Beachfront Events

Create unforgettable moments in paradise

Your Perfect Event Here

Our beachfront space is the perfect setting to celebrate the most important moments of your life. With spacious gardens, natural privacy, and a dedicated professional team, we create unique and personalized experiences.

Weddings at Terraza del Pacifico

Where Your Forever Begins on the Shores of Paradise

Imagine exchanging vows with the Pacific Ocean as your backdrop, golden sunlight reflecting off the waves, and the warm tropical breeze carrying the sound of the sea through your ceremony.

At Terraza del Pacifico, weddings are more than events—they are once-in-a-lifetime experiences thoughtfully designed to bring your dream celebration to life. Nestled directly on the pristine shores of Playa Hermosa, our beachfront resort offers an unforgettable setting where lush tropical gardens, breathtaking sunsets, oceanfront dining, and authentic Costa Rican beauty come together to create a wedding unlike any other.

From intimate beachfront ceremonies to elegant receptions beneath the stars, our dedicated team works closely with every couple to ensure every detail is flawlessly executed. As the sun sets over the Pacific and the sky transforms into shades of gold, pink, and crimson, you'll create memories that will last far beyond your wedding day. Because the most important day of your life deserves one of the most beautiful settings on Earth.

Your Love Story Begins Here.

Learn More
Surf Nights

Our professional lighting system transforms Playa Hermosa beach into a world-class stage. With professional-grade lighting equipment strategically positioned, we create an experience that combines adrenaline, safety, and unprecedented spectacle.

This exclusive capability makes Terraza del Pacífico an essential destination for professional and amateur surfers looking to live a truly unique experience: competing under the stars with professional visibility.

Competition-grade professional lighting
Safe environment in open sea
World-class experience
Learn More
Other Events

Family celebrations, corporate events, private dinners, and more. Our versatile spaces and professional team adapt to any type of event you imagine.

With personalized catering from Chef Luigi, audiovisual technology, live entertainment, and tropical decoration, we make every event unique and memorable.
